entries.title: Arcane Inkwell
entries.description: Transform markdown directories into beautiful documentation sites
entries.excerpt: $1 transforms your markdown files into a fully-featured documentation website. Built on $1 (Dart's web framework) with one-line theming via $1. Quick Start Features - $1 - Sidebar built from folder structure - $1 - Note, Tip, Warning, Important, Caution blocks - $1 - Dart, JavaScript, YAML, and more - $1 - One-line theming with multiple color options - $1 - Built-in client-side search - $1 - Auto-generated from headings - $1 - Direct links to edit pages on GitHub - $1 - Automatic calculation -

entries.title: Callout Blocks
entries.description: Use GitHub-style callouts for important information
entries.excerpt: Callout Blocks Arcane Jaspr MD supports GitHub-style callout blocks (also known as admonitions or alerts). These are useful for highlighting important information. Note Use notes for informational content: [!NOTE] This is an informational note. Notes are great for additional context or tips that aren't critical but are helpful to know. Tip Use tips for helpful suggestions: [!TIP] Here's a helpful tip! Tips work well for best practices or recommendations that improve the user experience.

entries.title: Code Blocks
entries.description: Syntax highlighting for multiple languages
entries.excerpt: Code blocks are automatically syntax highlighted using Highlight.js. Hover over any code block to see the $1 in the top-right corner. [!TIP] Click the copy icon to copy code to your clipboard. The icon changes to a checkmark for 2 seconds to confirm. Dart JavaScript YAML Bash JSON Supported Languages - Dart - JavaScript / TypeScript - YAML - JSON - Bash / Shell - HTML - CSS - Markdown

entries.title: Media Embeds
entries.description: Images, GIFs, videos, and embedded content
entries.excerpt: Media Embeds Arcane Inkwell provides a special syntax for embedding media content. Use the syntax to embed videos, images, GIFs, and more. YouTube Videos Embed YouTube videos using the video ID or full URL: Live Example @$1 With Options You can add attributes for autoplay, loop, mute, and timestamps: Local Videos Embed video files from your assets: Supported Formats | Format | Extension | Notes | |--------|-----------|-------| | MP4 | | Most compatible | | WebM | | Modern browsers | | OGG | , |

entries.title: Navigation
entries.description: Sidebar, breadcrumbs, and page navigation
entries.excerpt: Sidebar Navigation The sidebar is auto-generated from your folder structure. Each folder with a becomes a collapsible section. Breadcrumbs Breadcrumbs show the current path. Visit the $1 section for deeper nesting. Previous/Next Look at the bottom of this page. You'll see links to navigate sequentially through the documentation. | Feature | Location | |---------|----------| | Sidebar | Left panel | | Breadcrumbs | Above title | | Prev/Next | Below content | | TOC | Right panel |

entries.title: Tags & Related Pages
entries.description: Organize and connect content with tags
entries.excerpt: Tags & Related Pages Tags help organize your documentation and show related content to readers. Adding Tags Add tags to any page using the frontmatter: Tag Display Tags are displayed in the page header as visual badges. Readers can quickly see what topics a page covers. Related Pages At the bottom of each page, a "Related Pages" section automatically appears showing other pages that share tags with the current page. This helps readers discover related content. The related pages feature: - Ranks

entries.title: Typography
entries.description: Headings, lists, and text formatting
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell renders standard markdown with beautiful typography. Headings automatically appear in the Table of Contents on the right. Headings All headings from H2-H4 are tracked in the table of contents. Third Level (H3) Nested headings create hierarchy in your documentation. Fourth Level (H4) Even deeper nesting for detailed sections. Text Formatting Standard markdown formatting is supported: - $1 with - $1 with - with backticks - ~~Strikethrough~~ with Lists Unordered Lists - First item -

entries.title: Guide
entries.description: Learn how to use Arcane Inkwell
entries.excerpt: This section contains step-by-step guides for getting started with Arcane Inkwell. Getting Started Start with the $1 subsection to learn how to install, configure, and run your documentation site. Advanced Topics Once you're comfortable with the basics, explore the $1 subsection for: - Keyboard shortcuts and accessibility - GitHub integration - SEO and sitemap generation

entries.title: GitHub Integration
entries.description: Edit links, releases, and repository integration
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell includes several GitHub integration features. Edit This Page Links When is configured, each page displays an "Edit this page" link that opens the file directly in GitHub's editor. Configuration How It Works Edit URLs are generated in the format: For example, if your config is: - : - : - : Then the page generates: Disabling Edit Links To disable edit links site-wide: GitHub Repository Link When is set, a GitHub link appears in the sidebar/header for easy access to your repository.

entries.title: Advanced
entries.description: Advanced features and customization options
entries.excerpt: This section covers advanced features for power users who want to customize and extend their documentation sites.

entries.description: Keyboard shortcuts and interactive features
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell includes keyboard shortcuts and interactive features for improved usability. Keyboard Shortcuts | Shortcut | Action | |----------|--------| | | Focus search input | | | Clear search and close results | Interactive Features Code Block Copy Every code block includes a copy button that appears on hover. 1. Hover over any code block 2. Click the copy icon in the top-right corner 3. The icon changes to a checkmark for 2 seconds to confirm Theme Toggle Click the sun/moon icon in the

entries.title: Sitemap Generation
entries.description: Automatic XML sitemap generation for SEO
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell automatically generates an XML sitemap for search engine optimization. How It Works During the build process, a file is generated at the root of your site containing all visible pages. Features Automatic Generation The sitemap is built from the navigation manifest, ensuring it stays in sync with your content. Visibility Filtering The sitemap automatically excludes: - Hidden pages ( in frontmatter) - Draft pages ( in frontmatter) Priority Calculation Page priority is calculated

entries.title: Components
entries.description: Reusable layout components for documentation pages
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell includes several reusable components for building documentation pages. KBChangelog Displays a styled changelog timeline from CHANGELOG.md content. Usage Features - $1: Each version shown with styled badge - $1: Shows release date if present - $1: Automatic links to releases when provided - $1: Different colors for Added, Changed, Fixed, etc. - $1: Visual icons for each change type Changelog Format Uses the $1 format: Section Colors | Section | Color | Icon |

entries.title: Extensions
entries.description: Markdown extensions and customization
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell includes several markdown extensions and supports custom extensions. Built-in Extensions These extensions are automatically enabled: CalloutExtension Transforms GitHub-style alert syntax into styled callout blocks. $1 $1 | Type | Usage | Description | |------|-------|-------------| | | | Informational note | | | | Helpful tip | | | | Important information | | | | Warning message | | | | Danger/caution message | $1 [!NOTE] This is a note callout rendered by the CalloutExtension.

entries.title: Frontmatter Reference
entries.description: All page-level frontmatter options for markdown files
entries.excerpt: Frontmatter is YAML metadata at the top of your markdown files. It controls how pages appear in navigation and how they're rendered. Basic Example Full Example All Options Page Metadata | Field | Type | Default | Description | |-------|------|---------|-------------| | | | Filename | Display title for the page | | | | | Page description (shown below title, used in meta tags) | | | | | Icon name, SVG path, or raw SVG (see $1) | | | | | Sort order within section (lower = first) | Visibility |

entries.title: Icons Reference
entries.description: All available icons for sections and pages
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell supports three types of icons in frontmatter and section configuration: 1. $1 - 90+ built-in icon names 2. $1 - Reference external files 3. $1 - Inline SVG markup Usage Lucide Icons (Recommended) Use a Lucide icon name string: SVG Files Reference an SVG file by path (relative to your site root or absolute URL): External URLs are also supported: Raw SVG Markup Embed SVG directly (useful for simple icons): [!NOTE] Raw SVG markup is rendered at 16x16 pixels and inherits the current

entries.title: Page Rating System
entries.description: Integrate thumbs up/down ratings with Firebase
entries.excerpt: The page rating system allows visitors to provide feedback on documentation pages with a simple thumbs up/down interface. Ratings are stored client-side and can be integrated with Firebase Firestore for persistence. Enabling Ratings Enable the rating widget in your : How It Works 1. A "Was this page helpful?" prompt appears at the bottom of each page 2. Users click thumbs up or thumbs down 3. Their choice is saved to localStorage to prevent duplicate votes 4. A custom JavaScript event is

entries.title: Search
entries.description: Built-in search functionality
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell includes a built-in client-side search that indexes your documentation for fast, instant results. Features - $1 - Results appear as you type - $1 - Use to focus search - $1 - Results are grouped by section - $1 - Searches titles, descriptions, and content excerpts Usage Mouse/Touch 1. Click the search input in the sidebar 2. Type your search query (minimum 2 characters) 3. Click a result to navigate Keyboard | Shortcut | Action | |----------|--------| | | Focus search input | | |

entries.title: Section Configuration
entries.description: Configure folders with _section.json5 or _section.yaml
entries.excerpt: Section configuration files control how folders appear in the sidebar navigation. Place a or file in any content folder to customize its appearance. File Formats Arcane Inkwell supports two configuration formats: JSON5 (Recommended) JSON5 supports comments and trailing commas, making it ideal for configuration: YAML Standard YAML format: [!TIP] JSON5 is preferred because it supports comments, which are helpful for documenting configuration choices. entries.title: Theming

Custom CSS Add custom styles via a file in your web directory: CSS Variables Both stylesheets expose CSS variables for customization: Colors Typography Spacing and Radius Dark Mode Classes Both themes add a class to the root element in dark mode: Theme Persistence Theme preference is stored in localStorage under the key .
